keys.sla01_p0: This Service Level Agreement ("SLA") describes service availability and support policies for the {brand} platform provided by iPrego Pte. Ltd., Singapore.
keys.sla01_p1: This SLA applies to customers with a valid {brand} subscription.
keys.sla02_p0: {brand} is a cloud SaaS platform providing ERP, accounting, HR, CRM, analytics, and workflow automation.
keys.sla03_p0: Target availability: 99.9% monthly uptime, measured as platform accessibility.
keys.sla04_p0: Maintenance may occur during low-traffic periods with advance notice where possible.
keys.sla05_p0: Incidents are categorized by severity with response targets from 1 hour (critical) to 2 business days (low).
keys.sla06_p1: Support hours vary by subscription plan.
keys.sla07_p0: {brand} maintains automated backups and recovery procedures; schedules may vary by operational requirements.
keys.sla08_p0: Operational monitoring, alerts, performance tracking, and access controls help maintain stability and security.
keys.sla09_p0: If uptime falls below committed levels, customers may request subscription credits within 30 days of the incident.
keys.sla11_p0: Material SLA changes will be communicated through official channels.
keys.sla12_p0: This SLA is governed by the laws of Singapore.
keys.sla12_p1: Disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of Singapore.
keys.sla13_p0: SLA inquiries: contact support via the email published on our website.
